_comment: STUB package manifest for Wave 1 Agent A5. DO NOT RENAME to package.json — this folder is absorbed by Agent A1's workspace package.json after merge. This file exists only so `npm install --package-lock-only` in this directory pulls the type declarations needed for `npx tsc --noEmit` to pass in isolation. After A1 lands, delete this file and let A1's workspace manifest own the deps.
name: @timed/trigger-scripts-stub
